audience_policies.source_phrase: Each promo code can be redeemed for 2 adult tickets at $15 each and 4 youth tickets (ages 7-17) at $10 each. Advanced timed ticket reservations on the MFA website are recommended but not required. Directions and information regarding e-voucher use will be provided in your confirm
